directory.title: Business directory

pricing.title: Simple plans for your business
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when the directory and CRM bring you more customers.
pricing.faq1a: Yes. Manage your subscription in the Stripe portal from your dashboard.
pricing.faq2q: Do Free plan leads get lost?
pricing.faq2a: No. Every lead is saved; Free only unlocks the first 20 of the month until you upgrade.
